text:
Areas for further exploration
Advanced agent patterns: multi-step reasoning, tool composition, and error recovery
Production deployment: scaling, monitoring, logging, and cost optimization
Custom integrations: connecting to proprietary systems and internal APIs
Agent orchestration: coordinating multiple agents for complex workflows
Specialized domains: legal document processing, medical data analysis, financial modeling
Performance tuning: optimizing latency, throughput, and token usage
